gist.headline: Media worker joins the automation party
gist.blurb: We finally added an auto-deploy workflow for the media service. No more forgetting to push the big red button after merging a fix!
gist.summary: Added a GitHub Actions workflow to automatically deploy the media.pollinations.ai Cloudflare worker on push.
gist.impact: Ensures fixes to the media service are immediately deployed to production without requiring manual intervention.
gist.visual_concept: A cute pixel robot with a CRT monitor head pressing a big 'DEPLOY' button, while the pollinations bee mascot watches happily with a clipboard. Background features a server rack with glowing lime green lights.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head pressing a glowing lime green (#ecf874) 'DEPLOY' button on a retro console. The tiny bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft pastel lavender gradient background with warm lighting. Lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes, emotionally warm.
